urdu transliteration text:
YA HAZRATE ABBAS, ROZE PE BULALO, BOHOT DOOR HOON TUMSE, ROZE PE BULALO
YA HAZRATE ABBAS
english translation text:
O’ Master Abbas, call me to your shrine,
I am far from you, call me to your shrine

urdu transliteration text: SHIKWA BHI TUMHI SE HAI SHIKAYAT BHI TUMHI SE
english translation text: We complain to you, and only to you

urdu transliteration text: HAR BAAT ME KEH SAKTA -NAHI MOLA KISI SE
english translation text: I can’t share all my problems o’ Master, with anyone else

urdu transliteration text: EK BAAR TO ROZE PE BULALIJIE AQA
english translation text: Call me to your shrine o’ Master, at least once

urdu transliteration text: DIL GHAMSE BHARA HAI, TUMHE AAKAR ME SUNAWOO
english translation text: The heart is full of sorrow, let me express my grief to you

urdu transliteration text: DUNYA ME KAHAN TERE SIWA KOI SAHARA
english translation text: Who is there to support us besides you?

urdu transliteration text: JEETE JI AGAR DEKHA -NAHI ROZA TUMHARA
english translation text: If I don’t see your shrine during my lifetime

urdu transliteration text: TO DOOR ME TUMSE NAHI REH PAAUNGA ZINDA
english translation text: I will not be able to live if I am far from you

urdu transliteration text: DIL GHAMSE BHARA HAI, TUMHE AAKAR ME SUNAWOO
english translation text: The heart is full of sorrow, let me express my grief to you

urdu transliteration text: RORO KE TERE ROZE KI JAALI KO BHIGOWU
english translation text: I will weep till the frame of your tombstone is covered with my tears

urdu transliteration text: CHOKAT KO TERI BAARAHA -ASHKON SE ME DHOWU
english translation text: Until your door-steps are washed with my tears

urdu transliteration text:
AY BAABE HAWIJ KARO ARMAAN YE PURA
O’ Baab e Hawaij, fulfil my desires
DIL GHAMSE BHARA HAI, TUMHE AAKAR ME SUNAWOO
english translation text: The heart is full of sorrow, let me express my grief to you

urdu transliteration text: DETA HON TUMHE WASTA ZAINAB KI RIDA KA
english translation text: For the sake of the veil of Zainab

urdu transliteration text: AUR SHAAME GHARIBAN ME -SAKINA KI SADA KA
english translation text: For the sake of the cries of Sakina on Shaam E Ghareeban

urdu transliteration text: SUNLO MERI FARYAD KO ABBAS KHUDARA
english translation text: Please listen to my plea for the sake of the Almighty

urdu transliteration text: DIL GHAMSE BHARA HAI, TUMHE AAKAR ME SUNAWOO
english translation text: The heart is full of sorrow, let me express my grief to you

urdu transliteration text: AY BAABE HAWAIJ TUMHE MOHSIN KI QASAM HAI
english translation text: O’ Baab e Hawaij, for the sake of Mohsin

urdu transliteration text: ABBAS TUMHE ASGHAR E -KAMSIN KI QASAM HAI
english translation text: Abbas, for the sake of the young Asgher

urdu transliteration text: BAS DEDO MUJHE OWN O MOHAMAD KA HI SADQA
english translation text: Please provide for me, for the sake of Aun and Muhammad

urdu transliteration text: DIL GHAMSE BHARA HAI, TUMHE AAKAR ME SUNAWOO
english translation text: The heart is full of sorrow, let me express my grief to you

urdu transliteration text: AB WASTA US PEHLU SHIKASTA KA HAI TUMKO
english translation text: For the sake of the broken rib

urdu transliteration text: AAKHIR ME BAS AB WASTA -ZAHRA KA HAI TUMKO
english translation text: And finally, for the sake of Zahra

urdu transliteration text: ROZE PE BULAKAR SUNO SALMAN SE NOHA
english translation text: Listen to the lamentations from ‘Salman’ (poet) at your shrine

urdu transliteration text: DIL GHAMSE BHARA HAI, TUMHE AAKAR ME SUNAWOO
english translation text: The heart is full of sorrow, let me express my grief to you
